name: Soil Testing Before Sowing
description: Test soil every 2-3 years to know nutrient status and pH.

name: Use Certified Seeds
description: Buy certified seeds to improve germination and crop yield.

name: Drip Irrigation for Water Saving
description: Use drip or sprinkler systems to reduce water use in dry regions.

name: Integrated Pest Management
description: Use pheromone traps, neem spray, and limited pesticide rotation.

name: Crop Rotation
description: Rotate cereals with pulses to improve soil fertility naturally.

name: Mulching for Moisture Retention
description: Use organic mulch to reduce evaporation and suppress weeds.
